a:T297da,<div class="specification">
<p>The diagram shows a section through the human brain.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: https://pixabay.com/vectors/brain-anatomy-human-medicine-150935/]</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Label the diagram to show part of the visual cortex of the brain.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline how the diagram can be identified as a human brain and not the brain of a monkey.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Explain how studies of lesions have helped to identify the functions of different parts of the brain.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>b:T11977,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">[Source: https://pixabay.com/vectors/brain-anatomy-human-medicine-150935/]</p>
<p><em>Accept any label within marked area</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. the cerebral hemispheres are larger «relative to rest of brain» ✔</p>
<p>b. the cerebral cortex forms a larger proportion of the brain ✔ </p>
<p>c. there is extensive folding of the cerebral cortex ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. lesions are areas of brain injury ✔</p>
<p>b. diagnosed in living people using MRI/CAT scan/PET scan ✔ </p>
<p>c. autopsies reveal the position and extent of lesions<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>animal experimentation ✔</p>
<p>d. the behaviour/functioning of patient with lesion was observed ✔</p>
<p><em>Other possible techniques: cerebral arteriogram/angiogram, diffusion weighted MRI</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>c:T50b,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Many candidates identified the correct region of the brain.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Few candidates were able to demonstrate the subject-specific vocabulary required to answer this question with clarity. Most did not refer to the cerebral cortex or even cerebrum, instead using vague terms like “brain.” Where students added detail, it was often about the frontal lobe, something this question was not addressing.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Students who did poorly on this question showed the same weaknesses already mentioned in earlier questions. They were unable to define what a lesion was, and few attempted to address the question directly. Rather than explaining how studies of lesions have helped identify functions of the brain, many candidates only described the relationship between parts of the brain and their functions. Nevertheless, a lenient interpretation of the marking point regarding observed changes in patients’ behaviours due to lesions in the brain allowed many students to achieve 1 mark.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/a/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","a"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19M.3.HL.TZ1.7"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","a-2-the-human-brain"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}]]}]
